notes: v1.14.147 - Blue rebrand finishing touches (two 1-line fixes John bundled): (1) DEPTH-SHADOW RESTORE - re-added the black depth drop-shadow ahead of the cyan glow in the single --icon-glow var, so it is now drop-shadow(0 5px 13px rgba(0,0,0,0.55)) drop-shadow(0 0 5.1px rgba(40,224,255,0.55)) drop-shadow(0 0 12.75px rgba(40,224,255,0.29)). Stage 6 had REPLACED the card icons' depth shadow with glow-only, reading too flat; this brings depth + glow together. NOTE: because it lives in the shared var, the depth shadow now also applies to .lbtn-img (launcher) and the nav .icon-glow icons (which had no depth before) - if that reads heavy on the small nav icons, scope it to .rf-i-img only. (2) BOM TOOL TILE - the final blue rebrand asset phantom-tool-bom-256.webp landed (clean reroll, no stray nuts/bolts); added img:'icons/phantom-tool-bom-256.webp' to the bom DEPLOY_TOOLS entry (mirrors the Stage 3 pattern) + precached it, so Deploy>Tools BOM now renders the blue art like the other 5 tiles. ALL 6 Deploy>Tools tiles are now branded. ?legacy=1 byte-identical (deploy_showTools redesign-only + body.rd img gate; .rf-i-img/glow redesign-only). Three-stamp lockstep 146->147. Gates: node --check x3 + sw.js, CSS brace balance unchanged, version.json valid JSON, 0 lone-LF. Render-verified iPhone14. DEVICE-VERIFY (gloved): close+reopen, confirm v1.14.147, card icons now show depth + glow (not flat); Work>Deploy>Tools BOM tile shows the blue art (all 6 tiles branded now); ?legacy=1 unchanged. ⭐ BLUE ICON REBRAND FULLY COMPLETE (Stages 1-4 + 6 + BOM; Stage 5 SYS-pill skipped by John). PRIOR v1.14.146 = Stage 6 glow bake; .145 = Stage 4 launcher; .144 = Stage 3 tools; .143 = shield 42px; .142 = Stage 2 shield; .141 = Stage 1 drop-ins.
